reasoning: The control CP-6(1) focuses on ensuring that there is an alternate storage site with separation from the primary site, which translates in Kubernetes to ensuring that data stored in etcd and persistent volumes are backed up and can be restored in case of primary site failure. This involves configuring backups for etcd and persistent volumes, as well as defining backup policies for storage classes.
